variables.name: text-success
variables.description: Positive or success text color token.

variables.name: text-danger
variables.description: Danger or error text color token.

variables.name: Gray/white
variables.description: Low emphasis background or inverse text

variables.name: device
variables.description: Reference token for responsive mode naming across mobile, tablet, and desktop.

variables.name: breakpoint-width
variables.description: Reference breakpoint widths for mobile, tablet, and desktop responsive modes.

variables.name: 2xl
variables.description: Responsive font-size token. Uses mobile/tablet value in base modes and desktop value in desktop mode.

variables.name: 3xl
variables.description: Responsive font-size token. Uses mobile/tablet value in base modes and desktop value in desktop mode.

variables.name: 4xl
variables.description: Responsive font-size token. Uses mobile/tablet value in base modes and desktop value in desktop mode.

variables.name: 5xl
variables.description: Responsive font-size token. Uses mobile/tablet value in base modes and desktop value in desktop mode.

variables.name: 6xl
variables.description: Responsive font-size token. Uses mobile/tablet value in base modes and desktop value in desktop mode.

variables.name: 7xl
variables.description: Responsive font-size token. Uses mobile/tablet value in base modes and desktop value in desktop mode.

variables.name: 8xl
variables.description: Responsive font-size token. Uses mobile/tablet value in base modes and desktop value in desktop mode.

variables.name: margin
variables.description: Responsive layout margin token. Uses base spacing on mobile/tablet and expanded spacing on desktop.

variables.name: Button/text-enabled
variables.description: Button text color token for default enabled state.

variables.description: Button text color token for hover state.
